schema.description: Describes the response body of the /debug/{datasource}/user API call

status.description: Upload and indexing status of the user

isActiveUser.description: Whether the user is active or not

uploadStatus.description: Upload status, enum of NOT_UPLOADED, UPLOADED, STATUS_UNKNOWN
uploadStatus.title: UploadStatusEnum

lastUploadedAt.description: Time of last successful upload for the user, in ISO 8601 format

status.title: UserStatusResponse

uploadedGroups.description: List of groups the user is a member of, as uploaded via permissions API.

items.description: describes a group in the datasource

name.description: name of the group. Should be unique among all groups for the datasource, and cannot have spaces.

items.title: DatasourceGroupDefinition

schema.title: DebugUserResponse
